content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type and context: This is a PR review request for an auto-generated PR that regenerated static assets (HTML pages, browser app data, etc.) for the ai-gene-review project.

b. Request type: This is a code review request - the user is asking me to review the pull request and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
- PR contains 1293 gene review YAML files and 1292 HTML pages
- Large change with +174,609 additions and -1,277,089 deletions (mostly due to data.js regeneration)
- 50 files changed, mostly new HTML files for gene reviews
- Auto-generated content triggered by changes to gene review data, schema, templates, or project definitions

d. Main tasks:
- Review the generated HTML files for correctness
- Check browser app data.js for integrity
- Examine any template or rendering code changes
- Assess performance implications of large data files
- Look for security issues in generated content
- Check if validation reports show new issues

e. Plan of action:
- Read key files to understand the generation process
- Spot-check a few generated HTML files
- Review the browser app data.js changes
- Check for any security concerns in generated content
- Look at validation reports if available
- Provide comprehensive review feedback

f. Limitations: I can review the code and provide feedback, but cannot run the actual linting/testing commands without proper setup. I'll focus on static analysis of the generated content and the generation process.
</analysis>

I'll review this auto-generated PR that regenerates static assets for the ai-gene-review project. Let me start by creating a todo list and analyzing the changes.

input.body: ### PR Review: Regenerate pages and browser app Reviewing this auto-generated PR that updates static assets after gene review changes. #### Review Checklist - [ ] Understand the project structure and generation process - [ ] Spot-check generated HTML files for correctness - [ ] Review browser app data.js changes - [ ] Check for security issues in generated content - [ ] Assess performance implications - [ ] Look for any validation issues - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23987860686)

content.text: Now let me understand the project structure and generation process by reading the CLAUDE.md file and examining some of the changed files.
